description:
Create a structured Architecture Decision Record (ADR) system in TiddlyWiki consisting of five ADR tiddlers and one Index tiddler. 

Each ADR tiddler must be tagged ADR, include a custom field named adr-status with the specified value, and contain a text body with the headings !! Context, !! Decision, and !! Consequences (including 1-2 realistic sentences for each section based on the title).

The ADRs to create are:
- ADR-001: Use PostgreSQL as Primary Database (Status: Accepted)
- ADR-002: Adopt REST API Architecture (Status: Accepted)
- ADR-003: Use Monolithic Deployment (Status: Deprecated); include a wikitext link to [[ADR-005: Migrate to Microservices Architecture]] stating it was superseded.
- ADR-004: Implement Event-Driven Messaging with RabbitMQ (Status: Proposed)
- ADR-005: Migrate to Microservices Architecture (Status: Accepted); include a wikitext link to [[ADR-003: Use Monolithic Deployment]] stating it supersedes it.

The index tiddler must be titled ADR Index, tagged ADR, and contain three headings: !! Accepted, !! Proposed, and !! Deprecated. Under each heading, use <$list> widgets with filter syntax (e.g., [tag[ADR]adr-status[Accepted]]) to dynamically list the ADRs matching that specific status.
